scripts.check:a11y: echo 'Accessibility checks: use Lighthouse CI or axe-core in CI'
scripts.submission:final: echo '=== SUBMISSION READINESS ===' && echo '' && echo '[1/7] TypeScript...' && npx tsc --noEmit && echo '  PASS' && echo '' && echo '[2/7] Lint...' && npx next lint --quiet && echo '  PASS' && echo '' && echo '[3/7] Tests...' && npm test && echo '' && echo '[4/7] Build...' && npm run build && echo '  PASS' && echo '' && echo '[5/7] Repo size...' && cd ../.. && git ls-files | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum | ForEach-Object { $size = [math]::Round($_.Sum / 1MB, 2); if ($size -lt 10) { Write-Host "  PASS ($($_.Count) files, $size MB)" } else { Write-Host "  FAIL ($size MB exceeds 10 MB)"; exit 1 } } && cd apps/web && echo '' && echo '[6/7] Branch check...' && $branch = git branch --show-current; if ($branch -eq 'main') { Write-Host "  PASS (branch: main)" } else { Write-Host "  FAIL (branch: $branch)"; exit 1 } && echo '' && echo '[7/7] Secrets check...' && $secrets = Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File -Include *.ts,*.tsx,*.js,*.json -Exclude node_modules | Select-String -Pattern '(sk-|AKIA|ghp_|glpat-)' | Measure-Object; if ($secrets.Count -eq 0) { Write-Host '  PASS (no API keys found)' } else { Write-Host "  FAIL ($($secrets.Count) potential secrets)"; exit 1 } && echo '' && echo '=== ALL CHECKS PASSED ==='
